should be kept In view that none of these Yogas wiU ever become
operative to the exclusion of any of the other Yogas present In the
horoscope, It ts, nevertheless. quite possible to distinguish one Yoga
from the other.
Yoga.s become fruitful when the planets are powerful both in the
Rasi chart and in the Navamsa chart. Hence the axiom "Grahanam
amsakamabalam':
Yogas which are known as quasi permanent indications in a
horoscope tend to show the degree of good lucl< or adversity a person
is likely to experience during his life time.
All Yogas are combinations of planets but all combinations of planets
do not constitute Yogas. They may be Arishtas as well. There are many
types of benefic Yogas like Ohana Yogas, Raja Yogas and Gnana Yogas,
Malefic Yogas mean and include Agnana Yogas. Maatak:a Yogas, Dur
Yogas, Ava Yogas and the like. In general Yogas which are benef.c or
malefic govetn health, personality, success and happin~s in life. rtnancial
